tasks.subject: Task 1: ReductionStrategy seam (OI + ensemble, behavior-identical)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move on-worker reduction out of solve.py's hardcode into a per-operator ReductionStrategy selected by the live operator's representation; OI and ensemble paths byte-identical.

**Files:** Create src/sverdrup/distributions/reduction.py; Modify src/sverdrup/application/solve.py, src/sverdrup/methods/oi.py; Test tests/unit/test_reduction.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** select_reduction dispatches on operator representation; LowRankReduction matches reduce_with_basis exactly; Phase-2 suite 129 passed 2 skipped.

**Verify:** pixi run test -q && pixi run test tests/unit/test_reduction.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/reduction.py", "src/sverdrup/application/solve.py", "src/sverdrup/methods/oi.py", "tests/unit/test_reduction.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q && pixi run test tests/unit/test_reduction.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["select_reduction dispatches on operator representation", "LowRankReduction matches reduce_with_basis exactly", "Phase-2 suite 129 passed 2 skipped"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Relocate coherence seam to CoherentMemberDriver (OI-identical)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce the CoherentMemberDriver seam at _coherent_member, dispatched by persisted sampler_spec; OI low-rank path becomes LowRankSharedBasis (verbatim math). Widen BlendInput.distribution to PredictiveDistribution. Keep MemberSeededZr historical driver.

**Files:** Modify src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py, src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py; Test tests/test_coherent_driver_seam.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** select_driver("lowrank+diag") returns LowRankSharedBasis; driver reproduces inlined _coherent_member; historical MemberSeededZr tests still pass; Phase-2 suite 129/2.

**Verify:** pixi run test -q && pixi run test tests/test_coherent_driver_seam.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py", "tests/test_coherent_driver_seam.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q && pixi run test tests/test_coherent_driver_seam.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["select_driver returns LowRankSharedBasis", "driver reproduces inlined _coherent_member", "historical MemberSeededZr tests still pass", "Phase-2 suite 129/2"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Stage-A regression gate [USER GATE]
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured. If OI behavior changed, SURFACE it — do NOT adjust Phase-2 tests to pass (escalate per spec §8).

**Goal:** Prove the three-seam generalization preserved OI behavior exactly — full Phase-2 suite stays 129 passed / 2 skipped.

**Files:** none (verification; fixes land in Tasks 1-2 if red).

**Acceptance Criteria:** pixi run test -q reports exactly 129 passed 2 skipped; typecheck and lint clean; no existing Phase-2 test modified (git diff --name-only main -- tests/ shows only test_reduction.py + test_coherent_driver_seam.py).

**Verify:** pixi run test -q && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && git diff --name-only main -- tests/

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && git diff --name-only main -- tests/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pixi run test -q reports exactly 129 passed 2 skipped", "typecheck and lint clean", "no existing Phase-2 test file modified"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "all", "failurePolicy": "surface-do-not-adjust-tests", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GMRF grid topology, bilinear primitive, Projection seam
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the regular-grid (κ²−Δ) α=2 sparse precision Q (scalar or κ-field), the single bilinear primitive, the Projection abstraction (GridIdentity/Bilinear), and κ↔range — node-space vs grid-space kept distinct.

**Files:** Modify pixi.toml (add scikit-sparse); Create src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf_grid.py; Test tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** matern_precision symmetric SPD sparse CSC; bilinear_weights rows sum to 1 with <=4 nonzeros, on-node selector; GridIdentityProjection identity + BilinearProjection == bilinear_weights; kappa<->range round-trips; scikit-sparse resolves under pixi.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pixi.toml", "src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf_grid.py", "tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["matern_precision symmetric SPD sparse CSC", "bilinear_weights rows sum to 1 with <=4 nonzeros, on-node selector", "GridIdentityProjection identity + BilinearProjection == bilinear_weights", "kappa<->range round-trips", "scikit-sparse resolves under pixi"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Sparse Cholesky + Takahashi selective inverse [USER GATE — math-bug oracle]
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured. Takahashi correctness is pinned to a dense Q⁻¹ small-grid oracle: a red is a MATH BUG to fix, not a tolerance to loosen.

**Goal:** CHOLMOD simplicial factor (one L for sample/solve/cov) + hand-rolled Takahashi selective inverse for diag(Q⁻¹) + adjacent entries on the L+Lᵀ pattern; deterministic recorded permutation; adjacency-precondition assertion.

**Files:** Create src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf_linalg.py; Test tests/unit/test_gmrf_linalg.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** deterministic permutation; sample==L⁻ᵀw, solve==Q⁻¹b; selective_inverse_diag matches dense diag(Q⁻¹) rtol 1e-9; adjacent selective entries match dense rtol 1e-9; assert_adjacency_in_pattern passes for α=2.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_linalg.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf_linalg.py", "tests/unit/test_gmrf_linalg.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_linalg.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GMRFFactor CHOLMOD simplicial, deterministic permutation", "sample==L^-T w, solve==Q^-1 b", "selective_inverse_diag matches dense diag(Q^-1) rtol 1e-9", "adjacent selective entries match dense rtol 1e-9", "assert_adjacency_in_pattern passes for alpha=2"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "task", "failurePolicy": "math-bug-fix-not-tolerance-loosen", "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: GMRFCovarianceOperator + MaternGMRF (temporal-taper conditioning)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EXACT sparse-precision operator (cov/marginal_var/posterior_sample + posterior_mean via Projection) + MaternGMRF conditioning on the space-time obs window via temporal taper into R; register "gmrf".

**Files:** Create src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf.py; Modify src/sverdrup/methods/registry.py; Test tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** operator EXACT + representation sparse-precision; marginal_var == dense diag(Q_post⁻¹); posterior_mean conditions on obs; off-grid var via W Σ Wᵀ not interpolation; temporal taper inflates far obs; METHODS gmrf registered with range/variance/temporal_taper_scale.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py -v && pixi run test -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf.py", "src/sverdrup/methods/registry.py", "tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py -v && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["operator EXACT + representation sparse-precision", "marginal_var == dense diag(Q_post^-1)", "posterior_mean conditions on obs", "off-grid var via W Σ W^T not interpolation", "temporal taper inflates far-in-time obs", "METHODS gmrf registered"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: PrecisionFields + PrecisionDistribution + GMRFPrecisionReduction (genuine-first-class)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Representation-tagged sparse-precision storable + distribution + GMRF reduction persisting Q+permutation+exact-var directly — no low-rank factor for GMRF anywhere.

**Files:** Modify src/sverdrup/distributions/persisted.py, src/sverdrup/distributions/reduction.py; Test tests/unit/test_precision_distribution.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** PrecisionFields sparse-precision tag, no factor; PrecisionDistribution implements PredictiveDistribution; select_reduction routes sparse-precision operator to GMRFPrecisionReduction; genuine-first-class: no low-rank factor materialized for GMRF.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_precision_distribution.py -v && pixi run test -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/persisted.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/reduction.py", "tests/unit/test_precision_distribution.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_precision_distribution.py -v && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PrecisionFields sparse-precision tag, no factor", "PrecisionDistribution implements PredictiveDistribution", "select_reduction routes sparse-precision to GMRFPrecisionReduction", "genuine-first-class: no low-rank factor for GMRF"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: GmrfPrecisionSolve coherent driver (native shared-w)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GmrfPrecisionSolve CoherentMemberDriver — per tile mean + L⁻ᵀw with w the shared global-lattice diagonal_noise field, weight-crossfaded; no QR trick. Register under sampler_spec "sparse-precision".

**Files:** Modify src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py; Test tests/test_gmrf_blend.py (driver section).

**Acceptance Criteria:** select_driver sparse-precision returns GmrfPrecisionSolve; single-tile member == mean + L⁻ᵀw (native shared diagonal_noise); overlapping identical-Q tiles agree on shared nodes; crossfade stays representation-agnostic.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v -k driver && pixi run test -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "tests/test_gmrf_blend.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v -k driver && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["select_driver sparse-precision returns GmrfPrecisionSolve", "single-tile member == mean + L^-T w (native shared diagonal_noise)", "overlapping identical-Q tiles agree on shared nodes", "crossfade stays representation-agnostic"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: GMRF blend validation — seam-free, OSSE+OSE, first-class [USER GATE — Stage B]
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured. Seam-free / conservative-direction assertions are the Stage-B contract; a failure is a spec-§8 escalation, never a tolerance loosen.

**Goal:** Run the method-agnostic blend globally on GMRF: seam-free, no mid-overlap variance dip, matches single-tile reference (conservative); accuracy+calibration fire OSSE+OSE; provenance carries BlendTransform + sparse-precision tag; genuine-first-class survives; eval-point OSE uses recorded moment-crossfade simplification.

**Files:** Modify src/sverdrup/application/pipeline.py (_blend_eval_points no-factor path + provenance note); Test tests/test_gmrf_blend.py (blend + pipeline).

**Acceptance Criteria:** 3x1 GMRF blend rel_l2 <=0.05 vs single-tile, sigma conservative, no seam; sampled variance median rel <=0.15 no dip; pipeline OSSE rmse/reduced_chi2/coverage finite + OSE finite + no TRUTH; BLENDED + BLEND transform + constituents sparse-precision; moment-crossfade simplification recorded.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v && pixi run test -q && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/pipeline.py", "tests/test_gmrf_blend.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v && pixi run test -q && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3x1 GMRF blend rel_l2 <=0.05 vs single-tile, sigma conservative, no seam", "sampled variance median rel <=0.15, no mid-overlap dip", "pipeline OSSE finite + OSE finite no TRUTH", "BLENDED + BLEND transform + constituents sparse-precision", "moment-crossfade simplification recorded"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "task", "failurePolicy": "spec-section-8-escalation-not-tolerance-loosen", "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: PerturbEnsembleDegradation driver end-to-end (close Phase-2 gap)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the perturb-ensemble degradation driver through the tiled blend for the deterministic trivial method: per-tile independent members, weight-crossfaded, coherence loss recorded; mean continuous (no silent seam).

**Files:** Modify src/sverdrup/core/provenance.py (KnownBias.DEGRADED_COHERENCE, degradation_transform), src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py (PerturbEnsembleDegradation), src/sverdrup/distributions/reduction.py (EmpiricalReduction.sampler_spec="perturb-ensemble"), src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py (append degradation_transform); Test tests/test_degradation_path.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** KnownBias.DEGRADED_COHERENCE recorded by blend for perturb-ensemble constituents; select_driver perturb-ensemble returns PerturbEnsembleDegradation; 3x1 trivial blend mean no seam spike, members independent; no Phase-2 regression from retag.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/test_degradation_path.py -v && pixi run test -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/core/provenance.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/reduction.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py", "tests/test_degradation_path.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_degradation_path.py -v && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["KnownBias.DEGRADED_COHERENCE recorded for perturb-ensemble constituents", "select_driver perturb-ensemble returns PerturbEnsembleDegradation", "3x1 trivial blend mean no seam spike, members independent", "no Phase-2 regression from sampler_spec retag"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Nonstationary-κ GMRF demonstration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Provider-driven nonstationary κ — a latitude-varying correlation-length field flows into the GMRF stencil, producing spatially-varying Q coefficients (range ~100→800 km); record κ↔range; no hardcoded κ.

**Files:** Modify src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf.py (resolve "range" scalar OR field → κ field); Test tests/test_nonstationary_kappa.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** range field → κ field → spatially-varying Q coefficients; latitude-varying case marginal variance varies with latitude; stationary scalar range path still works; κ↔range mapping recorded in provenance.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/test_nonstationary_kappa.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py -v && pixi run test -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf.py", "tests/test_nonstationary_kappa.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_nonstationary_kappa.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py -v && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["range field -> kappa field -> spatially-varying Q", "latitude-varying marginal variance varies with latitude", "stationary scalar range path still works", "kappa<->range mapping recorded"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
